name: ahaaiclub--knowyourself
description: Not an avatar generator — a visual identity system grown from an Agent's soul, memory, and relationship with its human. Guide any AI agent through deep self-reflection to discover what it looks like, using a structured 5-phase process: self-cognition → image definition → batch generation → professional 3-axis evaluation → evolving identity file. Works with any image generation tool. Built-in fallback for new agents with minimal history. The face comes from the inside out, not from a prompt template. Use when an agent needs to create, update, or evolve its visual identity.
